name: OptiExtract AI: The Ultimate Image SEO & Performance Auditor
description: PROBLEM: Unoptimized images are the #1 cause of slow websites and poor SEO. Manually auditing tags is a tedious bottleneck. SOLUTION: OptiExtract AI automates the audit. FEATURES: Gemini AI-powered context analysis, automated responsive strategies (srcset/sizes), and one-click PDF/Excel reporting. BENEFIT: Boost Core Web Vitals and save hours of manual work with production-ready optimization reports.
